audience: Heads of Growth at US B2B AI startups with 20–100 employees
anti_icp: companies without a verified work email
buyer_problem: Small growth teams lose campaign learning between research, copy, execution, and reporting.
value_proposition: Turn verified market signals into reviewable campaign briefs and reusable experiment records.

evidence.observation: Northstar AI is hiring its first lifecycle marketer.

experiment.hypothesis: A signal-led message about preserving campaign learning will earn more positive replies than a generic automation pitch.
experiment.variable: opening frame: verified hiring signal versus generic automation claim

steps.subject: your first lifecycle hire
steps.body: Teams making their first lifecycle hire often need campaign learning to survive beyond one person's notes. Northstar AI's open role made me wonder whether a reviewable signal-to-experiment workflow would be useful.

steps.subject: the experiment record
steps.body: The useful part is not another copy generator. It is a versioned record connecting each signal, message decision, guardrail, and result so the next wave starts smarter.

steps.subject: close the loop
steps.body: Closing the loop here. If preserving the reasoning behind growth experiments becomes timely, the open example will still be available.
